prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.5 kg; Height 177.3 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 202mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.8kg; 9 months ago 74.8kg; 6 months ago 74.7kg; 3 months ago 77.7kg; current 79.5kg), Height (12 months ago 177.3cm; 9 months ago 177.3cm; 6 months ago 177.3cm; 3 months ago 177.3cm; current 177.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 67mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 100U/L; 3 months ago 99U/L; current 96U/L), AST (12 months ago 65U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 66U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 62U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 102mg/g; 9 months ago 106mg/g; 6 months ago 86mg/g; 3 months ago 91mg/g; current 111mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
